data.raceComments: {"comment":"The fantastic Autumn racing in Sydney continues with a 10-race card being held at Royal Randwick, on a day that includes the Sydney Cup and the QEII Stakes worth 5 million dollars. The Listed Fernhill Mile for juveniles will start proceedings, and 1. HYDROBOMB is up from Melbourne after winning at Sandown-Lakeside 17 days ago, when steaming home from last to score by nearly a length. The extra 200m is ideal, and if he copes with racing in a clockwise direction, then he can repeat the dose. 5. STITZER made his debut in the G3 Baillieu at Rosehill 2 weeks ago, running on late for sixth. He has a private reputation, and he can only improve with more racing. Stick with him on an each-way basis. 8. SUMAC had no luck and should have finished closer than fifth in the same race as the second pick. She will also relish getting out to 1600m, and she can bounce straight back into the money. 3. DIAMETER had some excuses last start against most of his rivals, and he is worth including at odds.","runners":[1,5,8,3],"exclusive":true}
